# Middle-Earth Interactive Map

> Unofficial fan-made interactive map of Middle-earth at the end of the Third Age.

## Canonical site

- https://middle-earth.jeantinland.com/

## Primary pages

- / : Interactive map application
- /about.html : Project overview, sources, and FAQ

## Data references

- /assets/data/pois.json : Points of interest dataset
- /assets/schemas/pois.json : JSON Schema for POI data

## Crawl and interpretation guidance

- Query parameters z, x, y, and r represent map viewport state only.
- Treat https://middle-earth.jeantinland.com/ as the canonical URL for map-state variants.
- Use /about.html for concise methodology and FAQ context.

## Attribution guidance

- Suggested citation name: Middle-Earth Interactive Map by Jean Tinland.
- Source code repository: https://github.com/Jean-Tinland/middle-earth/
- Development journal: https://www.jeantinland.com/journal/lotr/
